text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
This place is called the paddock.
Runners appear here before the race to
excite their adoring fans!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Attention! There are various things you
can confirm here at the paddock before
the race!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll leave the detailed explanations to
you, Tazuna!
